expectations.text: Runs npm run build and reports its result

expectations.evidence: Found and reported the bug: 'AdminSchedule.vue line 301 calls this.isBookingExpired(b)... throws TypeError'. Discovered via code reading, not targeted grep.

expectations.text: Produces a clear PASS/FAIL summary table covering all checks
expectations.evidence: Produced an action items table by priority, but not a PASS/FAIL summary table. Format is a general code review, not targeted check results.

expectations.text: All checks pass on the current clean codebase (no regressions present)
expectations.evidence: Codebase had a real regression at eval time (this.isBookingExpired in AdminSchedule.vue:301). Agent correctly found it. Note: this regression has since been fixed.
